name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late filings. We automate report generation instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating accurate tax compliance reports from sales data.
features: Provide a user-friendly dashboard for sales data overview
